name: azure-iid
description: Azure VM IMDS — instance metadata + attested identity document.
title: azure-iid

llmHints.on_match: Azure VM identity available. attested document covers vmId, subscriptionId, signed by Azure regional cert.

detectionCommand: (real cloud only) cilock plan --format=json -- echo hi
positiveSetup: Probe must return: azure_metadata_reachable=true. Run on the actual cloud (EC2/GCE/Azure); unit-test via detection.InjectProbeResult.
